commands.name: decrypt

options.name: --error-log
options.description:
Write detailed error information to a separate log
file

options.name: --key
options.description:
The file containing the RSA private key in XML
format

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output directory or file path (default: adds
.decrypted to original filename)

options.name: --strict
options.description:
Fail immediately on first decryption error (default:
false, continues processing)

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description:
Path to encrypted log file, directory (uses *.log 
pattern), or glob pattern (e.g., *.log)

commands.description: Decrypt encrypted log files using an RSA private key

commands.name: generate

options.name: --key-size
options.description: The size of the RSA key in bits (default: 2048)

options.name: --output
options.description:
The output path to write the public/private key pair
in XML format

commands.description: Generate a new RSA key pair for log encryption
